author: @simontrueman
text: Hi Robert, quick question about a source of sodium bromide. Would the addition of Sodium Dichloroisocyanurate break the reaction or me? I ask as it's easy to obtain as a swimming pool chemical with sodium bromide/Sodium Dichloroisocyanurate mix. Could the Sodium Dichloroisocyanurate replace the bleach? I'm new to all this so asking others is safer than just relying on my own guesswork.

author: @neelpanchal3884
text: will 325mesh graphite flake will work good? because its quite hard to get 5micron flake graphite.

author: @chaitanyabhave2092
text: Can this be done with chlorine? As in chlorine intercalation compunds?

replies.author: @chaitanyabhave2092

author: @rokasuzpelkis3642
text: Hey Robert, what do you think about using Bromine on Monothermal device, becouse it has bigger electronegativity than graphene ? Did you tried it ?

author: @leonardjanus5538
text: Is possible ti use ammonium bromide instead of NaBr?

replies.author: @leonardjanus5538
replies.text:
Robert Murray-Smith
I have try, and work, but with hydrogen peroxide instead of NaClO.

author: @Pelukeitor
text:
Robert se puede usar Bromine-chlorine-dimethylhydantoine (BCDMH) en este proceso?
(Cuando el BCDMH es disuelto en agua, se libera acido hipobromoso y acido hipocloro. Esta es la razón por la que el bromo puede utilizarse como desinfectante y agente oxidante.)

Can Robert use are Bromine-chlorine-dimethylhydantoine (BCDMH) in this process?
(When the BCDMH is dissolved in water, hypobromous acid and hypochlorous acid. This is the reason why bromine can be used as a disinfectant and bleaching agent)
